title: OREGON BARBER AND HAIRDRESSER GRANT PROGRAM - 211info
text: HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON BARBER AND HAIRDRESSER GRANT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a one-time grant to students attending a participating school in barbering, hair design, or cosmetology. Funding is based on availability and is not guaranteed. 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Must be attending a licensed school of barbering, hair design, or cosmetology cosmetology that is a financial aid-eligible -Enroll full-time in a program which is at least nine months long or 900 clock hours -Must not be concurrently enrolled in high school and the beauty or barbering program -Must not be in default with any federal student loans Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-7400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Student Financial Aid Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - DECEASED OR DISABLED PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICER GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OFFICE OF STUDENT ACCESS AND COMPLETION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROMISE GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TEACHER SCHOLARS PROGRAM GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TRIBAL STUDENT GRANT MILITARY SERVICE - OREGON NATIONAL GUARD STATE TUITION ASSISTANCE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION
